name: greenington
description: The Whitelist. A browser extension that hides everything except whitelisted channels. Inspired by the AI slop epidemic. YouTube first, more platforms coming.

scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:e2e
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:all && npm run test:unit && npm run test:dom && npm run test:e2e

author: Csanád S. Béres
